markdown:
#  Send an Estimate to the Budget 
##  Background 
After you have completed an estimate in the Estimating tool, you can use the 'Send to Budget' option to copy and import line items from that estimate into the project's budget. The cost codes and amounts on the estimate will be reflected on the budget.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/permissions)
  * Your company must be licensed for Procore's Project Financials tools.
  * To send an estimate to the budget, the estimate must be set as the primary estimate as indicated with a checkmark ![Icon Green Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b18333d194d3db8dbcc1b8a78cbdfec/8ff203a9339f899ef677a436aa111bdd/icon-green-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.
  * Default below the line adjustments such as Profit, Overhead, Discount, Taxes, and Others are set in the company's Admin tool.
  * If there is a part on the estimate with Labor, Materials, and Tax applied to it, the item will appear as three (3) separate line items in your budget (one for labor, one for materials, and one for tax).


#####  Note
Currently Send to Budget sends only data from the primary estimate without any included estimates.
##  Steps 
#####  Note
The segments and items that you can select on your Procore project are unique to your project's specific WBS. Contact your company's Procore Administrator if you require assistance with creating a budget code for your environment.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Estimating** tool.
  2. Click the **Estimating** tab.
  3. Select the **estimate**.  

![Estimate Selection Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2a01a716f966b487b0d3d48145af3e2c/5081994b0555d96f62d8cb26890d5712/estimate-selection-menu.png?fm=webp)
  4. Click the **Actions** menu and select **Send to Budget**.
  5. Update any below the line adjustments as needed.
     * **Send Costs** : Select send costs only or send entire estimate including additional adjustments.
     * **Profit, Overhead, Discount, Taxes, Others** : Select spread across estimate items or summarize into specific budget code. See [How do budget codes in an estimate create line items in a budget?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-budget-codes-in-an-estimate-create-line-items-in-a-budget)
       * If summarizing into a specific budget code, click **Select** or the **current selection** to configure the cost code and cost type for each. Then click **Save Changes**.
  6. _Optional_ : Select **Manage** to make changes to the WBS segments and budget code structure.
![Send Preview](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1b723e67cfbdaa4ca1703a1ea7649d53/1dcfc9f779f999bd4efe27e58e14e7de/send-preview.png?fm=webp)
  7. Click **Send to Budget**.


## See Also

  * [Create a Prime Contract from an Estimate](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/create-prime-contract-from-estimate)
  * [Send a Change Order to the Change Events Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/estimating-project/tutorials/send-a-change-order-to-the-change-events-tool)
title: Send an Estimate to the Budget
description: How to send line items from an estimate to the budget in a Procore project.
